special_mechanics.name: Sled Travel
special_mechanics.description: Kevin travels between houses via sled in top-down view mode

special_mechanics.name: 2D Platformer Combat
special_mechanics.description: Transitions to side-scroller 2D platformer format when Kevin enters houses to fight Wet Bandits

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Crafting
special_mechanics.description: Kevin can combine items to create makeshift weapons with different projectile behaviors (rifle, bazooka, launcher, mortar)

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data. Wikipedia source contains only high-level gameplay descriptions without precise physics parameters, movement values, or technical specifications. Genesis version mixes top-down sled navigation with side-scroller platformer segments but no movement metrics are documented.
